title: Figma learning lab: bringing designs to life with Figma Motion
key_points: An introductory, beginner-friendly session designed to ease newcomers into using motion within Figma.
Covers Figma Motion features and the essentials needed to get started bringing designs to life with animation.
Focuses on adding energy and movement to product experiences to make them feel more alive.
Part of Figma's Learning Lab format, with a follow-on Learning Lab Lounge for informal time with the Figma team.
